Test name: CCRb offset (12 m, -2 m/s^2)

Test Description

In the Car-to-Car Rear Braking (CCRb) scenario, subject vehicle travels forwards towards a target vehicle that is traveling at constant speed and then decelerates, and the foremost part of the vehicle strikes the rearmost part of the other. In CCRb scenario there is no lateral overlap.

  • Regulation or protocol: EURONCAP 2023 TP AEB/CarCar
  • Ego speed: 50 km/h
  • Target speed: 50 km/h
  • Overlap between both vehicles: 50 %
  • Distance between vehicles: 12 m
  • Target vehicle deceleration: -2 m/s2
  • TTC at start: greater than 4 s
